---
title: "Edith Coleridge"
---

## Edith Coleridge

**Dates:** (24 June 1832-24 Jan 1911)

### Description

cousin of Christabel Coleridge

### Biography

Daughter of Henry Nelson Coleridge and Sara Coleridge, she moved in with the Derwent Coleridges in July 1857 aged 25.  She was an artist, and may have contributed illustrations to the <i>Barnacle</i>. 
Unlike Christabel she was related to CMY, through her father, who was Sir John Taylor Coleridge\'s brother. [Hainton, <i>Unknown Coleridge</i>, Roels MSS genealogy]

### Letters

- Letter from May 28th [1887]
- Letter from Decr 3d [1868]
- Letter from Sept 15th [1868]
- Letter from May 25 th [1867]
- Letter from Jan 30th [1867] 
- Letter from March 10th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
